title: cyrtandra oblongifolia var. oblongifolia
intro: Cyrtandra oblongifolia var. oblongifolia is a variety of the Cyrtandra oblongifolia plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is also known as the "Makalani" or "Forest Orchid". The medicinal properties of Cyrtandra oblongifolia var. oblongifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
